_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: ND Discord Bot (Bun)
author: nightz@development.local
description: Custom Pelican Egg for the ND Discord Gemini Bot using Bun. Uses a start.sh wrapper to avoid the Docker entrypoint quote-stripping crash loop. Includes required env vars for Discord token, Gemini key, and dashboard config.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt update
apt install -y git curl unzip

cd /mnt/server

# Install Bun locally to the install container (debian:bullseye-slim has no bun).
curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"

# Install dependencies if package.json is present.
if [ -f package.json ]; then
  bun install
else
  echo "[install] WARNING: no package.json found; upload the project files and reinstall."
fi

# Ensure the startup wrapper is executable (uploads from Windows often lose +x).
if [ -f start.sh ]; then
  chmod +x start.sh
fi

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Your bot's secret token from the Discord Developer Portal. Required.

variables.name: Google API Key (Gemini)
variables.description: API key for Google Gemini. Required.

variables.name: Dashboard Token
variables.description: Secret token for the admin dashboard. Use 32+ hex chars (the bot refuses non-loopback binds with shorter tokens). Generate: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: Dashboard Port
variables.description: TCP port the dashboard binds to. Set this to the port Pelican allocated to this server (shown on the server overview).

variables.name: Dashboard Enabled
variables.description: Enable the built-in admin dashboard web server. 1 = on, 0 = off.

variables.name: Dashboard Host
variables.description: Interface the dashboard binds to. Must be 0.0.0.0 on Pelican so the container can route external traffic in.

variables.name: Claude API Key (optional)
variables.description: Anthropic API key for Claude. Leave blank to disable Claude provider.

variables.name: OpenAI API Key (optional)
variables.description: OpenAI API key. Leave blank to disable OpenAI provider.

variables.name: Gemini Model
variables.description: Primary Gemini model ID. Defaults to gemini-3-flash-preview if unset.
